products.name: Casual Checked Shirt & White Denim Set
products.description: Includes 1x Premium Checked Casual Shirt and 1x Loose Fit White Denim Jeans.
products.inspiration: Embrace effortless casual style with this perfectly curated checked shirt and white denim combo. Designed for everyday comfort and a relaxed, modern silhouette.

products.name: Contrast Stitch Shirt & Wide-Leg Denim Set
products.description: Includes 1x Contrast Stitch Utility Shirt and 1x Wide-Leg Light Wash Denim Jeans
products.inspiration: A perfect blend of retro utility and modern streetwear aesthetics. This set pairs a relaxed contrast-stitch shirt with effortlessly cool wide-leg denim for an instant, curated look.
products.compositionAndCare: Machine wash cold inside out with like colors. Tumble dry low or line dry in shade. Warm iron if needed.
products.Name: Contrast Stitch Shirt & Wide-Leg Denim Set
products.title: Contrast Stitch Shirt & Wide-Leg Denim Set

products.name: Urban Graphic Camp Shirt & Trouser Set
products.description: Includes 1x Graphic Print Short-Sleeve Shirt. Includes 1x Off-White Relaxed Fit Trouser.
products.inspiration: Designed for the modern trendsetter, this co-ord set merges effortless streetwear aesthetics with ultimate daily comfort. Featuring bold back graphics and a relaxed silhouette, it's the perfect ensemble for casual outings and urban adventures.
products.compositionAndCare: Machine wash cold with like colors. Tumble dry low. Warm iron if needed. Do not bleach.

SHIRT_DETAILS.DETAILS: Short sleeves, camp collar, button-down front, bold graphic print on the back.

TROUSER_DETAILS.DETAILS: Off-white color, elasticated waistband with drawstring, side pockets, clean hem.

products.inspiration: Embrace effortless summer elegance with this premium cotton-linen co-ord set, designed for ultimate comfort and breathability. Perfect for resort getaways, casual outings, or relaxed weekends under the sun.
